title: Aesthetic Colors
description: Add vibrant new colors to your world! Aesthetic Colors expands the Minecraft palette with seamlessly integrated shades for both vanilla and modded blocks and items.
body:
# **🎨 Aesthetic Colors**

Aesthetic Colors is a Minecraft mod that brings a fresh spectrum of colors to your world, enhancing creativity and customization like never before! It’s designed to blend seamlessly with vanilla and modded content, extending vibrant new dyes to a variety of blocks and items.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c12140141cf74bb3e1f800d40fea26222dccd54.png)

[![Arboreal Nature link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb219391aa8cf79057f2c736395e069ed3382279.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arboreal-nature)
[![Jam & Jelly link](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1133928/description_4a57ed46-7a8c-452d-b4dc-4e35ec16afae.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jam-jelly)
[![Aesthetic Seating link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e12aa9643912496a675d17b7a88b1692f01924e1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/aesthetic-seating)

[![Ko-fi link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd32bda2dbe27a0b4100056a8e7f54e83e98f7fc.png)](https://ko-fi.com/almiris)
[![Patreon link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e95a1a4d85b20de6b1f942286f9b43793d1c6dc.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/Almiris)
[![CurseForge link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e13c79f563423cc2402a14b79f9cbe456020321.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aesthetic-colors)

## **✅ Works with:**

- Wool & Carpets
- Beds
- Stained Glass & Panes
- Terracotta
- Candles
- And many more colorable blocks!

## **✨ Why Use Aesthetic Colors?**
Whether you're a builder seeking nuanced tones, a redstone engineer organizing with color codes, or a modpack creator looking for visual harmony, Aesthetic Colors offers a beautiful new palette that fits right into the Minecraft aesthetic.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/057df48a0900919b922225a780678d152d8a2407_0.webp)

## **🌈 New Colors Available**
Here are the 16 new dye colors currently added by the mod:

### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/578e28848cea512e3e69c1e4b3ede28795168b26.png) Beige

### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b159c252a90e5febc1c783672d80911b424201d0.png) Cognac
### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08d66e91a1bca22d2f5907a0fffcdf1c8112df9b.png) Ebony
### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5a5e94ed6d7dde7a6d4033f87d95f9ea35b953e.png) Olive
### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca2a9165bffea974155cfe8642af41b30fb572e.png) Mint
### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbf817845022850ccea4a9a9c33469cc869ed7ec.png) Teal Green
### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1b62a7e9648b99886a5db4ac9f22c9724aff433.png) Burgundy
### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c393e2a849928f07def9383ae5b8356603f08a20.png) Marsala
### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/687c566a1a93e03477f95fc61c364972a5a0155c.png) Fuchsia
### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b29d5c96eaee5556b2ba7a1505da5fc35f471c52.png) Blue Iris
### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/225d4a465c49253364308c65d4a8a58f33061c99.png) Khaki
### ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14b39cc6ff4947629409e6c70fa42b7e3fe4e83c.png) Aquamarine

**🛠️ Each dye is craftable using vanilla-friendly recipes and will support compatibility with modded materials in the future.**
